name: autoreview
description: Deterministic pre-commit review gate for AI coding agents - intercepts git commit and triggers a structured multi-reviewer pass for risky staged changes. Requires python3.

interface.shortDescription: Pre-commit review gate for AI coding agents
interface.longDescription: A PreToolUse hook intercepts git commit and runs a deterministic, zero-LLM gate over the staged change. Trivial changes pass silently; non-trivial, sensitive, or hand-resolved-merge changes are blocked with a directive to run the autoreview skill. The skill launches provider-neutral reviewer profiles (correctness, security, conventions), requires strict JSON outcomes, and writes a content-keyed marker only for approved or non-blocking commented results. The gate runs on python3 and fails open if the runtime is absent.
